meanings.definition: imagine; conceive of; see in one's mind
examples: I can't see him on horseback!
I can see what will happen
I can see a risk in this strategy
I cannot envision him as President

meanings.definition: seen in the mind as a mental image
examples: the glory of his envisioned future
the snow-covered Alps pictured in her imagination
the visualized scene lacked the ugly details of real life
